title: 4 Jewish community ambulances set ablaze in London in suspected hate crime; video shows burning vehicles
summary_full: Four Jewish community ambulances were torched in Golders Green, London, in an incident police are investigating as an antisemitic hate crime. CCTV shows three suspects setting the vehicles ablaze before fleeing.  Exploding oxygen cylinders damaged nearby properties, but no injuries were reported.  Authorities are appealing for information and increasing patrols.
